positive: Minimalist ethereal celestial forest scene. A central composition featuring geometric bioluminescent flora and fauna (mushrooms, stylized deer silhouettes, glowing vines) intertwined with constellations and nebulous dust clouds. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and synthwave geometry. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, turquoise, and vibrant neon magenta accents against an obsidian black background. High contrast, sharp line work, clean silhouettes, radial symmetry, designed for apparel printing. Volumetric lighting, crisp edges, deep depth of field, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, writing, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, poorly drawn, lowres, gradient colors
